text: In My Father’s House Are Many Rooms

segments.text: Do not let your hearts be troubled. You believe in God; believe in Me as well.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: In My Father’s house are many rooms. If it were not so, would I have told you that I am going there to prepare a place for you?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And if I go and prepare a place for you, I will come back and welcome you into My presence, so that you also may be where I am.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You know the way to the place where I am going.
segments.speaker: Jesus

text: The Way, the Truth, and the Life

segments.text: Lord,
segments.speaker: Thomas

segments.text: said Thomas,
we do not know where You are going, so how can we know the way?
segments.speaker: Thomas

segments.text: Jesus answered,
I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you had known Me, you would know My Father as well. From now on you do know Him and have seen Him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Philip said to Him,
Lord, show us the Father, and that will be enough for us.
segments.speaker: Philip

segments.text: Jesus replied,
Philip, I have been with you all this time, and still you do not know Me? Anyone who has seen Me has seen the Father. How can you say, ‘Show us the Father’?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Do you not believe that I am in the Father and the Father is in Me? The words I say to you, I do not speak on My own. Instead, it is the Father dwelling in Me, performing His works.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Believe Me that I am in the Father and the Father is in Me—or at least believe on account of the works themselves.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Truly, truly, I tell you, whoever believes in Me will also do the works that I am doing. He will do even greater things than these, because I am going to the Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And I will do whatever you ask in My name, so that the Father may be glorified in the Son.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you ask Me for anything in My name, I will do it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If you love Me, you will keep My commandments.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And I will ask the Father, and He will give you another Advocate to be with you forever—
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: the Spirit of truth. The world cannot receive Him, because it neither sees Him nor knows Him. But you do know Him, for He abides with you and will be in you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I will not leave you as orphans; I will come to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: In a little while the world will see Me no more, but you will see Me. Because I live, you also will live.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: On that day you will know that I am in My Father, and you are in Me, and I am in you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Whoever has My commandments and keeps them is the one who loves Me. The one who loves Me will be loved by My Father, and I will love him and reveal Myself to him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Judas (not Iscariot) asked Him,
Lord, why are You going to reveal Yourself to us and not to the world?
segments.speaker: Judas (not Iscariot)

segments.text: Jesus replied, “If anyone loves Me, he will keep My word. My Father will love him, and We will come to him and make Our home with him.
Whoever does not love Me does not keep My words. The word that you hear is not My own, but it is from the Father who sent Me.
All this I have spoken to you while I am still with you.
But the Advocate, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in My name, will teach you all things and will remind you of everything I have told you.
Peace I leave with you; My peace I give to you. I do not give to you as the world gives. Do not let your hearts be troubled; do not be afraid.
You heard Me say, ‘I am going away, and I am coming back to you.’ If you loved Me, you would rejoice that I am going to the Father, because the Father is greater than I.
And now I have told you before it happens, so that when it does happen, you will believe.
I will not speak with you much longer, for the prince of this world is coming, and he has no claim on Me.

But I do exactly what the Father has commanded Me, so that the world may know that I love the Father.
Get up! Let us go on from here.
